body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-8417", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:P/PR:N/UI:A/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-352", "name": "Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)"}], "description": "Concrete CMS 9.5.0 and below does not validate a CSRF token before processing requests to /dashboard/extend/update/do_update/<pkgHandle>. The do_update() method in concrete/controllers/single_page/dashboard/extend/update.php checks only canInstallPackages() before executing upgradeCoreData() and upgrade() on the named package's controller. Because the endpoint is a state-changing GET route with no token enforcement, an attacker can force an authenticated administrator to trigger a package upgrade via a single cross-site navigation.In order to be vulnerable, the victim must be passing canInstallPackages() and and a target package must already be already installed. The Concrete CMS security team thanks @maru1009 for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00122, "percentile": 0.02279}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jr5g-qv3g-rxxx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-24T18:28:42Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jr5g-qv3g-rxxx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jr5g-qv3g-rxxx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-8417"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-21T21:16:33Z", "published_at": "2026-05-21T21:30:38Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8417", "https://documentation.concretecms.org/9-x/developers/introduction/version-history/951-release-notes", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jr5g-qv3g-rxxx"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/concretecms/concretecms", "summary": "Concrete does not validate a CSRF token before processing requests to `/dashboard/extend/update/do_update/<pkgHandle>`", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-24T18:28:43Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jr5g-qv3g-rxxx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "9.5.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "concrete5/concrete5"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 9.5.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Concrete does not validate a CSRF token before processing requests to `/dashboard/extend/update/do_update/<pkgHandle>`
